series_metadata.series_description: The Electronic Transaction Report (ETR) was mandated by the Ohio Office of Information Technology (OIT) to determine approval for agency use of electronic signatures and digital certifications. Records may include: The completed ETR form, supporting documentation and electronic environment infrastructure records.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain records while the approved process is in place and utilized by the agency. Destroy when the process becomes obsolete and no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: Retain records while the approved process is in place and utilized by the agency. Destroy when the process becomes obsolete and no longer of administrative value., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
